## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / logs
If applicable, add screenshots or console/agent-service logs.

## Environment

- Role/persona (if relevant):
- Browser / OS:
- Commit or version:

## Additional context
Anything else that helps us understand the issue.
